# SΔϕ AI-readable mirror

This repository is an AI-readable routing and ingestion layer for selected Sofience-DeltaPhi packages.

Canonical citation layer: Zenodo DOI.
AI ingestion layer: GitHub Markdown, TXT, YAML, JSON.

## Start files

- 00_AI_ENTRYPOINT.md
- SERIES_INDEX.json
- SERIES_DOI_MAP.json
- SDELTA_MODULE_ROUTING.yaml
- SDELTA_ACCESS_PROTOCOL.yaml

## Minimal boot

47 -> 62 -> 39 -> 65 -> 64 -> 56

## Newly connected sequences

Early operational core:
02 -> 04 -> 05 -> 06 -> 07

Closure / residual / re-entry:
08 -> 09 -> 10

Ethics / path / victory:
41 -> 44 -> 45

## New DOI packages

- SDeltaPhi-02: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20213230
- SDeltaPhi-04: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20213716
- SDeltaPhi-05: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20214446

- SDeltaPhi-07: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20215608
- SDeltaPhi-08: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20217566
- SDeltaPhi-09: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20218139
- SDeltaPhi-10: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20218533

- SDeltaPhi-44: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20219296
- SDeltaPhi-45: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20225676
